name: MISRA C++: Compliance Summary Produced
description: A Guidelines Compliance Summary (GCS) is produced as the primary record of overall project compliance.
rationale: MISRA Compliance:2020: the GCS is the primary record of compliance, with an entry for every guideline, its compliance level, deviations and re-categorizations.

examples.fails: the required compliance artifact/step is absent

source: MISRA Compliance:2020 — Achieving compliance with MISRA Coding Guidelines, applied to MISRA C++:2023. https://misra.org.uk/
